docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,246.80 FILED BY BORNSTEIN, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT TRACHY, PETE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
